scripts.--- graph:update --: Updates C++ AST nodes (Tree-Sitter). Runs automatically on commit.
scripts.graph:update: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); spawnSync('graphify', ['update', '.'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env, PYTHONUNBUFFERED: '1' } });"
scripts.--- graph:enrich ---: Runs deep semantic extraction using qwen2.5-coder:7b locally via Ollama.
scripts.graph:enrich: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const py = fs.existsSync('.venv/Scripts/python.exe') ? '.venv/Scripts/python.exe' : fs.existsSync('.venv/bin/python') ? '.venv/bin/python' : 'python'; spawnSync(py, ['scripts/graph_enrich_interactive.py', '.', '--mode=deep', '--backend=openai', '--model', 'qwen2.5-coder:7b', '--max-concurrency', '1'], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.--- graph:enrich:32b ---: Runs deep semantic extraction using qwen2.5-coder:32b locally via Ollama.
scripts.graph:enrich:32b: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const py = fs.existsSync('.venv/Scripts/python.exe') ? '.venv/Scripts/python.exe' : fs.existsSync('.venv/bin/python') ? '.venv/bin/python' : 'python'; spawnSync(py, ['scripts/graph_enrich_interactive.py', '.', '--mode=deep', '--backend=openai', '--model', 'qwen2.5-coder:32b', '--max-concurrency', '1'], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.--- graph:link ---: Maps C++ symbols and file structures to technical documentation.
scripts.graph:link: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const py = fs.existsSync('.venv/Scripts/python.exe') ? '.venv/Scripts/python.exe' : fs.existsSync('.venv/bin/python') ? '.venv/bin/python' : 'python'; spawnSync(py, ['scripts/link_docs_to_code.py'], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.--- serena:sync ---: Syncs .ai facts & generates Ollama C++ summaries for Serena. Runs automatically on commit.
scripts.serena:sync: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const py = fs.existsSync('.venv/Scripts/python.exe') ? '.venv/Scripts/python.exe' : fs.existsSync('.venv/bin/python') ? '.venv/bin/python' : 'python'; spawnSync(py, ['scripts/serena_sync_memories.py'], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.--- agents:sync ---: Syncs agents-source.md blocks to CLAUDE.md/GEMINI.md/Copilot. Runs on commit.
scripts.agents:sync: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const py = fs.existsSync('.venv/Scripts/python.exe') ? '.venv/Scripts/python.exe' : fs.existsSync('.venv/bin/python') ? '.venv/bin/python' : 'python'; spawnSync(py, ['scripts/sync_agent_docs.py'], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.--- init ---: Initializes python virtual environment (.venv) and installs pip dependencies.
scripts.init: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); spawnSync('python', ['-m', 'venv', '.venv'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); const pip = require('fs').existsSync('.venv/Scripts/pip.exe') ? '.venv/Scripts/pip.exe' : require('fs').existsSync('.venv/bin/pip') ? '.venv/bin/pip' : 'pip'; spawnSync(pip, ['install', '-r', 'requirements.txt'], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
